# disruption.forgemesh.io - Disruption Intelligence
> Geospatial disruption intelligence API built from WARN filings, labor signals, and regional economic events.
> Paid x402 endpoints from $0.01-$0.25 per call. Base mainnet (eip155:8453). No API key needed.

## Event Intelligence
GET /events/:id/severity — $0.01 — Event severity summary
GET /events/:id/history — $0.02 — Event history
GET /events/:id/relationships — $0.02 — Event relationship summary
GET /events/:id/timeline — $0.05 — Event timeline
GET /events/:id/company-intel — $0.03 — Company context
GET /companies/search — $0.01 — Company search
GET /companies/:id — $0.05 — Company profile
GET /companies/:id/intelligence — $0.05 — Company risk summary
GET /radius/:zip — $0.05 — Nearby disruption events
GET /territory/:zip/disruption — $0.10 — Territory disruption summary
GET /regions/:state — $0.02 — Regional disruption summaries
GET /regions/:state/:county — $0.01 — County disruption summary
GET /jurisdictions — $0.02 — Jurisdiction activity summaries
GET /jurisdictions/:state — $0.01 — State activity summary
GET /watchlists/:id/preview — $0.03 — Company watchlist event preview
GET /watchlists/:id/preview.csv — $0.05 — Company watchlist event preview CSV
GET /ripple/index — $0.01 — Location-only Ripple signal index
GET /ripple/signals — $0.10 — Ripple Signals
GET /ripple/brief — $0.25 — Disruption Intelligence Ripple Report
GET /ripple/signals/:id/sector-impacts — $0.15 — Ripple Paths for one signal
GET /gold/index — $0.01 — Legacy alias for Ripple Index
GET /gold/signals — $0.10 — Legacy alias for Ripple Signals
GET /gold/brief — $0.25 — Legacy alias for Ripple Report
GET /gold/signals/:id/sector-impacts — $0.15 — Legacy alias for Ripple Paths

## Free Endpoints
GET /health — Service availability
GET /stats - Aggregate disruption overview
GET /events - Basic event preview (max 5, optional state filter)
GET /events/recent - Recent event preview (max 5)
GET /events/:id - Basic event preview
GET /rankings/states - State disruption ranking preview
GET /rankings/counties - County disruption ranking preview
GET /company/:name - Company-name event preview (max 5)
GET /state/:state - State event preview (max 5)
GET /sources - Public source coverage

## Payment
- Network: Base mainnet (eip155:8453)
- Receiving wallet: 0xA8774fACfD3Da2EA11f240C977b9973D78aDFCFe
- Facilitator: https://x402.org/facilitator/
- Protocol: x402 USDC micropayments
